utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 items appear in the final coverage plan. Each item requires the type of coverage and costs. The plan provides a description and a cost for each of the five items. The descriptions specify the category (e.g., physical and mental health insurance; home/contents; travel; enhancement service; total budget) and each has a cost listed. While brand names are generic, the required details (coverage type and cost) are present for each item, and the total budget includes a monthly cost breakdown. Therefore, all 5 are included and specified according to the requested format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists specific products: LifeFirst Standard Plan for physical health, LifeFirst Standard Plan for mental health, PrimeHome Premium Coverage for home contents, LifeFirst Standard Plan for travel insurance, and Home Office Protection add-on. Using the ground-truth ratings: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health) rating 8; LifeFirst Standard Plan (mental health) rating 8; PrimeHome Premium Coverage (home content) rating 10; LifeFirst Standard Plan (travel) rating 7; Home Office Protection (property enhancement service) rating 8. Mapped each exactly by name and category.
